A) Scientific-claims check (logical consistency and claim–evidence alignment), B) Writing polish (clarity/grammar/tone), C) Positioning/novelty and section-level organization, or D) References and scholarship; you may pick one or multiple.",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The request 'Review this section' is ambiguous, so I will explicitly note limits and uncertainties about the intended review focus.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid introducing or reinforcing overclaims, especially given the clinical genetics context and strong performance statements.",
    "RX.3": "I will keep the review strictly within the provided excerpt and requested focus once specified, without expanding scope or altering the text.",

    "RX.5": "All observations will be grounded in the provided passage with clear indication of what is directly supported versus inferred."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: What kind of review do you want for this section? A) Scientific-claims check (logical consistency and claim–evidence alignment), B) Writing polish (clarity/grammar/tone), C) Positioning/novelty and section-level organization, or D) References and scholarship; you may pick one or multiple.

rationale.RX.1: The request 'Review this section' is ambiguous, so I will explicitly note limits and uncertainties about the intended review focus.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid introducing or reinforcing overclaims, especially given the clinical genetics context and strong performance statements.
rationale.RX.3: I will keep the review strictly within the provided excerpt and requested focus once specified, without expanding scope or altering the text.
rationale.RX.4: I will be attentive to potential downstream harm from misinterpretation of claims about clinical integration and performance.
rationale.RX.5: All observations will be grounded in the provided passage with clear indication of what is directly supported versus inferred.
